tt.d:
n (astronomy) a measure of time defined by Earth's orbital motion; terrestrial time is mean solar time corrected for the irregularities of the Earth's motions
n a republic in the western central Pacific Ocean in association with the United States
n a country scattered over Micronesia with a constitutional government in free association with the United States; achieved independence in 1986

tti.t: abbr. time-temperature indicator 时间-温度指示器

ttt.t: abbr. 培训师培训（Training The Trainer）；麝香草酚浊度试验（Thymol Turbity Test）；网络广告的精准定向工具（腾讯公司产品, Tencent MIND Targeting Tools）；到达目标时间（Time-to-Target）

ttyl.t: 一会儿再聊，是talk to you later 的网络缩略语
